primary_sources.title: UMNO registration under Societies Act 1966 (and predecessor 1949 Societies Ordinance)
Funston, J. Malay Politics in Malaysia (Heinemann, 1980)

notes: Founded 11 May 1946 in Johor by Onn Jaafar. Deregistered by court order 1988 (the 'Team A vs Team B' crisis), refounded as UMNO Baru. Dominant party 1957-2018; major partner Unity Govt 2022-. Cohesion index reflects Court Cluster splits, 2020 Sheraton schism, and Bersatu/Amanah defections.
